nasb.text: So Johanan the son of Kareah and all the commanders of the forces, and all the people, did not obey the voice of the Lord to stay in the land of Judah.

esv.text: So Johanan the son of Kareah and all the commanders of the forces and all the people did not obey the voice of the Lord, to remain in the land of Judah.

cnv.text: 於是加利亞的兒子約哈難和眾將領，以及眾民，都不聽從耶和華要他們留在猶大地的命令。

ccb.text: 于是，加利亚的儿子约哈难和众将领及民众都不听从耶和华让他们留在犹大的命令。
